bewisclient.alpha.description: Adjust the transparency of the entity highlight
bewisclient.auto_gg.cooldown_ms.descript: Minimum gap between two AutoGG chat sends to avoid double-firing on duplicate events.
bewisclient.auto_gg.custom.description: The custom AutoGG message. Only used when 'Use Custom Message' is enabled.
bewisclient.auto_gg.match_end.descriptio: If on, AutoGG will also send the message on clear match-end lines such as 'You won the match!', 'Victory!' or 'Game Over!'.
bewisclient.auto_gg.preset.description: One of the preset messages sent after a kill. Common presets: 'gg', 'ggs', 'nice match'. Supports comma-separated lists if you want multiple messages rotated.
bewisclient.auto_gg.use_custom.descripti: When on, AutoGG sends your custom message below instead of the preset. Pure chat etiquette — no gameplay automation.
bewisclient.better_visibility.nether.des: Improve visibility in the Nether dimension
bewisclient.block_highlight.color.descri: Change the color of the block highlight
bewisclient.border_radius.description: Set the radius of the widget's border corners
bewisclient.brightness.description: Adjust the brightness level. 0.0 to 1.0 are the normal levels, while 1.0 to 15.0 is lighting up the world according to the brightness level
bewisclient.category.biome_widget.descri: Displays the current biome at your position.
Displays your current coordinates in the world
bewisclient.category.cps_widget.descript: Displays your current clicks per second (CPS).
bewisclient.category.custom_widget.descr: A widget which you can customize in any way you want
bewisclient.category.daytime_widget.desc: Displays the current in-game time in hours and minutes.
bewisclient.category.fps_widget.descript: Displays your current frames per second (FPS).
bewisclient.category.inventory_widget.de: Displays your inventory on the screen.
bewisclient.category.key_widget.descript: Displays your movement and attack/use keys.
bewisclient.category.ping_widget.descrip: Displays your current ping in milliseconds (ms).
bewisclient.category.server_widget.descr: Displays your current server IP address.
bewisclient.category.speed_widget.descri: Displays your current speed in blocks per second.
bewisclient.category.tiwyla_widget.descr: Show information about the block or entity you are looking at.
bewisclient.color.changing.description: A color that changes over time, cycling through the spectrum based on the speed set.
bewisclient.color.static.description: A static color that does not change.
bewisclient.color.theme.description: A color that uses the client's theme color with the brightness set.
bewisclient.contact.discord.description: Join our Discord server to chat with the community and get support.
bewisclient.contact.discord.title: Discord
bewisclient.contact.github.description: The source code of Capy Client is available on GitHub.
bewisclient.contact.github.title: GitHub
bewisclient.contact.issues.description: Report bugs or request features on our GitHub issue tracker.
bewisclient.contact.issues.title: Issue Tracker
bewisclient.contact.modrinth.description: The official download page of Capy Client on Modrinth.
bewisclient.contact.modrinth.title: Modrinth
bewisclient.cosmetics.elytra.description: Some capes include a unique texture for the elytra, which can be disabled here if desired.
bewisclient.default_border_radius.descri: Set the default radius of a widget's border corners
bewisclient.default_line_spacing.descrip: Set the default spacing between lines of text in a widget
bewisclient.default_padding_size.descrip: Set the default padding at the edge of a widget to the text
bewisclient.default_scale.description: Set the default scale of a widget
bewisclient.entity_highlight.color.descr: Change the color of the entity highlight
bewisclient.fullbright.night_vision.desc: Allows you to have the visual effect of night vision without actually having it
bewisclient.fullbright.night_vision.erro: When night vision is applied via Capy Client, the effect will not be the same as if you got it via a potion, because Capy Client preserves the old way in which night vision works, which illuminates the world completely, whilst with the status effect it is always rendered as if the brightness is set all the way down to moody.
bewisclient.gap.description: Set the gap between the keys in the widget
bewisclient.height.description: Adjust the height of the fire overlay on your screen
bewisclient.held_item_tooltip.multiple_b: Select which information to show in the held item tooltip
bewisclient.home.more_widget_options: More customization options can be found in the widgets tab
bewisclient.home.no_quick_settings: Here you can add settings that you need frequently, so you don't have to search for them in the different categories and have quicker access to them.
bewisclient.line_spacing.description: Set the spacing between lines of text in the widget
bewisclient.max_shown_lines.description: Maximum number of lines to show in the held item tooltip
bewisclient.menu.cosmetics.need_to_accep: You need to accept the privacy notice to enable online mode.
bewisclient.menu.cosmetics.online_mode_r: ⚠ You need to restart the game for this setting to take effect.
bewisclient.menu.pack.download_from_modr: Select and download packs from Modrinth
bewisclient.menu.resource_pack.bewisclie: Features can be enabled in the Capy Client settings
bewisclient.options_menu.background_colo: The background color used for menus. Reset to use the theme color.
bewisclient.options_menu.blur_background: Whether to blur the background when opening menus
bewisclient.options_menu.button_in_game_: Whether to show the Capy Client button in the in-game pause menu
bewisclient.options_menu.button_in_title: Whether to show the Capy Client button in the title screen
bewisclient.options_menu.default_backgro: Set the default color and opacity of a widget
Set the default color and opacity of a widget's border
bewisclient.options_menu.default_text_co: Set the default color of the text in a widget
bewisclient.options_menu.default_text_sh: Set whether text in a widget has a shadow by default
bewisclient.options_menu.minecrafty_opti: Whether to use a Minecrafty style options menu instead of the default flat design
bewisclient.options_menu.online_mode.des: Whether to enable online features such as special cosmetics and cosmetic syncing. Needs to be enabled if you want other players to see your cosmetics or if you want to see other players' cosmetics. Requires restarting the client to take effect.
bewisclient.options_menu.theme_color.des: The theme color used throughout the client
bewisclient.pack.download_failed: Failed to download pack. Please try again later.
bewisclient.padding_size.description: Set the padding at the edge of the widget to the text
bewisclient.panorama.confirm_panorama_de: Are you sure you want to delete this panorama?
bewisclient.panorama.info_text: The panorama functionality allows you to set a custom panorama background for the main menu. You can create the panorama by pressing the "%s" button [%s]. After taking the screenshot select the screenshot below.
bewisclient.panorama.name_already_exists: A panorama with this name already exists
bewisclient.player_nametag.color.descrip: Color used when 'Rainbow Color' is disabled.
bewisclient.player_nametag.rainbow.descr: Animates the nametag color through the hue spectrum over time.
bewisclient.no_chat_lag.max_messages.des: Hard cap on the number of chat messages kept in history. New messages beyond this cap are dropped. Lower values use less memory and avoid frame spikes on big servers.
bewisclient.popup.add_widget.title: Add Widget
bewisclient.privacy.accept: Accept privacy notice and enable online mode
bewisclient.privacy.header: Read and accept privacy notice to continue
bewisclient.rainbow_speed.description: Hue rotation speed in cycles-per-second-like units. Higher = faster change.
bewisclient.scale.description: Set the scale of the widget
bewisclient.scoreboard.scale.description: Adjust the size of the scoreboard
bewisclient.screen_edge_distance.descrip: Set the snapping distance of a widget to the screen edge
bewisclient.screenshot.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this screenshot?
bewisclient.screenshot.redirect.descript: When clicking the screenshot name in chat, the screenshot opens in the in-game screen instead of an external program.
bewisclient.settings.tiwyla_info.title: Special Block Information
bewisclient.thickness.description: Adjust the thickness of the block highlight
bewisclient.visible_distance.description: Don't render custom nametags for players farther than this in blocks.
bewisclient.widget.armor_widget.color_co: Toggle whether to color code the durability text
bewisclient.widget.armor_widget.show_dur: Toggle whether to show armor durability
bewisclient.widget.armor_widget.show_emp: Toggle whether to show an icon for empty armor slots
Toggle whether to show empty armor slots
bewisclient.widget.armor_widget.show_per: Toggle whether to show durability as a percentage
bewisclient.widget.biome_widget.color_co: Whether to color code the biome name
bewisclient.widget.coordinates_widget.co: Whether to color code the biome name
bewisclient.widget.coordinates_widget.sh: Shows how your coordinates will change if you move forward
bewisclient.widget.custom_widget.centere: Whether the text should be centered
bewisclient.widget.custom_widget.data.bi: The ID of the biome you are currently in
"colored" to color code the biome name
The name of the biome you are currently in
"colored" to color code the biome name
bewisclient.widget.custom_widget.data.cp: Your current left clicks per second
Your current right clicks per second
Your current total clicks per second
bewisclient.widget.custom_widget.data.da: The current in-game time in hours and minutes
"true" or "false" to override the 12-hour format setting
bewisclient.widget.custom_widget.data.di: The cardinal direction the player is facing
bewisclient.widget.custom_widget.data.ho: Your current horizontal speed in blocks per second
bewisclient.widget.custom_widget.data.re: A language tag (e.g., "en-US") to format the date accordingly
The current real-life time in hours and minutes
"seconds" to include seconds in the time
bewisclient.widget.custom_widget.data.to: Your current total speed in blocks per second
The current x coordinate of the player
The current y coordinate of the player
The current z coordinate of the player
bewisclient.widget.custom_widget.maximum: The maximum width of the widget
bewisclient.widget.custom_widget.minimum: The minimum width of the widget
bewisclient.widget.custom_widget.param_i: You can include live information in the Custom Widget using curly brackets, e.g. {biome_id}. Some data points can take parameters, which can be specified after a | character. For example, {real_time|seconds} will show the real time including seconds.
bewisclient.widget.key_widget.background: Set the color of the widget's background
bewisclient.widget.key_widget.keys: Select which keys should be shown
bewisclient.widget.key_widget.pressed_ba: Set the color and opacity of the widget when a key is pressed
bewisclient.widget.key_widget.pressed_bo: Set the color and opacity of the widget's border when a key is pressed
bewisclient.widget.key_widget.pressed_te: Set the color of the text in the widget when a key is pressed
bewisclient.widget.key_widget.show_cps.d: Shows your clicks per second (CPS) for the attack/use keys
bewisclient.widget.line_widget.backgroun: Set the color and opacity of the widget's background
bewisclient.widget.line_widget.border.de: Set the color and opacity of the widget's border
bewisclient.widget.line_widget.text_colo: Set the color of the text in the widget
bewisclient.widget.line_widget.text_shad: Set whether text in the widget has a shadow
bewisclient.widget.tiwyla_widget.bottom_: Set the color of the bottom text in the widget
bewisclient.widget.tiwyla_widget.informa: The Information of the health of the entity that you are looking at is not available on multiplayer servers due to cheating concerns. In singleplayer worlds it is still available.
bewisclient.widget.tiwyla_widget.top_tex: Set the color of the top text in the widget
bewisclient.zoom.instant.description: Disables the transition animation when zooming in or out
bewisclient.zoom.smooth.description: Enable or disable smooth zoom (Works as if smooth camera is enabled)
bewisclient.zoom.factor.description: How much to zoom in (lower = more zoom). 0.23 = vanilla-accurate, 0.05 = extreme close-up.
bewisclient.zoom.min_factor.description: Lower bound when using the scroll wheel to zoom in further.
bewisclient.zoom.smooth_duration.descrip: Duration in milliseconds of the zoom-in/out animation. 0 = instant.
bewisclient.zoom.scroll_to_zoom.descript: Allow the scroll wheel to fine-tune the zoom level while zoom is active.
bewisclient.zoom.scroll_sensitivity.desc: How much the scroll wheel changes the zoom factor. Higher = more aggressive.
bewisclient.zoom.reset_on_release.descri: Snap the zoom back to 1.0 when the key is released.
bewisclient.zoom.keep_smooth_camera.desc: Temporarily enable vanilla smooth-camera while zoomed, restore prior setting on release.
bewisclient.scoreboard.offset_x.descript: Shift the scoreboard horizontally in pixels. Positive moves right, negative moves left.
bewisclient.scoreboard.offset_y.descript: Shift the scoreboard vertically in pixels. Positive moves down, negative moves up.
bewisclient.scoreboard.opacity.descripti: Global opacity of the scoreboard. Lower values fade the entire sidebar.
bewisclient.scoreboard.animation_time.de: Animation duration when the scoreboard appears, disappears, or changes objective.
bewisclient.scoreboard.hide_title.descri: Hide the title row at the top of the scoreboard sidebar.
bewisclient.scoreboard.hide_score_number: Hide the small score numbers on the right side of each row.
bewisclient.scoreboard.hide_background.d: Hide the dark background behind the scoreboard entries.
bewisclient.scoreboard.text_shadow.descr: Whether scoreboard text has a drop shadow.
bewisclient.scoreboard.show_on_any_objec: If off, the scale/opacity/offset are only applied when a real objective is shown (not the dummy sidebar).
bewisclient.fire_height.opacity.descript: How opaque the fire overlay is. 0 = invisible, 1 = full vanilla strength.
Push the fire overlay up (negative) or down (positive) on the screen.
bewisclient.fire_height.render_mode.desc: translate / scale / static. Controls how the height setting is applied to the overlay.
bewisclient.perspective.sensitivity.desc: How fast the camera rotates while the perspective key is held. Lower values give finer aim.
bewisclient.perspective.hold_to_toggle.d: When on, perspective only activates while the key is held. When off, the key toggles perspective on/off.
bewisclient.perspective.restore_on_disab: Snap the camera back to its original rotation when perspective is released/disabled.
bewisclient.perspective.max_pitch.descri: Maximum pitch the perspective camera can rotate to (clamped).
bewisclient.perspective.max_yaw.descript: Maximum yaw the perspective camera can rotate to (clamped).
bewisclient.block_highlight.filled.descr: Also draw a translucent box around the targeted block.
bewisclient.block_highlight.filled_opaci: Opacity of the filled box when 'Filled Box' is on. 0 = invisible, 1 = fully solid.
bewisclient.block_highlight.range.descri: Only highlight blocks within this many blocks of the player. Vanilla is 6.
bewisclient.block_highlight.only_when_sn: Only show the highlight when the player is sneaking.
bewisclient.block_highlight.pulse.descri: Animate the highlight thickness to make it easier to spot the target.
How fast the highlight pulses. Higher = faster.
bewisclient.block_highlight.line_style.d: smooth / crisp / glow. Controls how the highlight outline is drawn.
bewisclient.entity_highlight.range.descr: Only highlight entities within this many blocks of the player.
bewisclient.entity_highlight.only_hostil: Restrict the highlight to hostile mobs only.
bewisclient.entity_highlight.only_passiv: Restrict the highlight to passive mobs only.
bewisclient.entity_highlight.only_player: Restrict the highlight to players only.
bewisclient.entity_highlight.only_when_l: Only highlight entities the crosshair is currently aimed at.
bewisclient.entity_highlight.show_self.d: Also highlight your own player entity (in F5, etc.).
bewisclient.entity_highlight.friendly_co: Color used for friendly mobs/players (when the related filter is on).
bewisclient.entity_highlight.show_health: Draw a small health indicator under the highlighted entity.
bewisclient.entity_highlight.pulse.descr: Animate the highlight alpha to make entities easier to spot.
bewisclient.entity_highlight.pulse_speed: How fast the highlight pulses. Higher = faster.
bewisclient.player_nametag.scale.descrip: Scale of the rendered nametag (1.0 = vanilla).
When on, your own player nametag is also rendered with the chosen color in third-person (F5) view.
bewisclient.player_nametag.self_mode.des: always / third_person / never. Always: show in any camera mode. Third-person: only in F5. Never: never show your own tag.
bewisclient.player_nametag.show_in_tab.d: Apply the custom color/format to the player's name in the Tab list.
bewisclient.player_nametag.show_in_score: Apply the custom color/format to the player's name in the scoreboard.
bewisclient.player_nametag.prefix.descri: Text prepended to every player's name (e.g. team tag).
bewisclient.player_nametag.suffix.descri: Text appended to every player's name.
bewisclient.player_nametag.outlined.desc: Render the name with a thick outline.
bewisclient.player_nametag.background_co: Optional background quad behind each nametag. Set background opacity > 0 to enable.
bewisclient.player_nametag.background_op: Background opacity. 0 = no background, 1 = fully opaque quad behind the name.
bewisclient.player_nametag.show_health.d: Show a tiny health bar under the nametag.
bewisclient.player_nametag.show_ping.des: Show the player's ping (ms) next to the nametag.
bewisclient.better_visibility.nether_mul: Multiplier for the nether atmospheric fog distance when enabled. 1.0 = vanilla, 2.0 = 2x as far.
bewisclient.better_visibility.water_mult: Multiplier for the underwater fog distance when enabled.
bewisclient.better_visibility.lava_multi: Multiplier for the lava fog distance when enabled.
bewisclient.better_visibility.powder_sno: Multiplier for the powder-snow fog distance when enabled.
bewisclient.better_visibility.disable_ne: When 'Nether' is on, also remove the orange tint from the fog.
bewisclient.better_visibility.reduce_wat: When 'Water' is on, also reduce the blue color shift underwater.
bewisclient.better_visibility.reduce_lav: When 'Lava' is on, also reduce the red color shift in lava.
bewisclient.better_visibility.remove_pow: When 'Powder Snow' is on, also remove the white tint from the fog.
